zh.lifeSummary: 當Angharrad Jevan於1550年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾迪爾時，她的父親Philip ap Jevan Gwilim25歲，母親Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym21歲。她於1570年與David Davis在威爾士結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1637年在威爾士格拉莫爾根利藍特維特 法爾德享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angharrad Jevan于1550年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾迪爾时，她的父亲Philip ap Jevan Gwilim25岁，母亲Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym21岁。她于1570年与David Davis在威尔士结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1637年在威尔士格拉莫爾根利藍特維特 法爾德享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jevan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Iefan ‘son of Evan’, with fused patronymic marker (a)p. Compare Evan and Evans .

variants.name: Bevans
meanings: Welsh (Pembrokeshire): variant of Bevan , with the addition of the regular English patronymic suffix -s.

variants.name: Bevin
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French bei vin, boi vin ‘drink wine’.
Welsh and English: variant of   Bevan  .

variants.name: Biven
meanings: Welsh: variant of   Bevan  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beaven
meanings: Possibly also English: variant of   Beavin  .

variants.name: Evan
meanings: Welsh (southern): from the personal name Evan, itself from Ieuan, a Welsh derivative of Latin Johannes (English John). See Evans .

nameMeanings.name: Angharrad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Angharrad Jevan was born in 1550, in Gwydir, Caernarfonshire, Wales, her father, Philip ap Jevan Gwilim, was 25 and her mother, Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym, was 21. She married David Davis in 1570, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1637, in Llantwit Fardre, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angharrad Jevan est née en 1550, à Gwydir, Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Philip ap Jevan Gwilim, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé David Davis en 1570, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1637, à Llantwit Fardre, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angharrad Jevan 1550 in Gwydir, Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip ap Jevan Gwilim 25 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym 21. Sie hat 1570 in Wales David Davis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1637 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Llantwit Fardre, Glamorgan, Wales.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharrad Jevanが1550年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアグウイディルで生まれた時，父Philip ap Jevan Gwilimは25歳，母Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilymは21歳であった。1570年にウェールズでDavid Davisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1637年にウェールズグラモーガンラントウィト ファルダーで87歳で死去した。

ko.St Mary Church, Glamorgan, Wales, United: 영국 웨일스 글램르건 스트 메리 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Angharrad Jevan(이)가 1550년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 그w이디르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip ap Jevan Gwilim(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1570년 웨일스에서 David Davis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1637년 웨일스 글램르건 랜트윗 패르드르에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.St Mary Church, Glamorgan, Wales, United: ст мэри чурч, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angharrad Jevan родилась в 1550 г. в местности гвидир, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Philip ap Jevan Gwilim было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Davis в 1570 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1637 г. в местности ллантвит фардр, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 87 лет.

Se casó con David Davis en 1570, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1637, en Llantwit Fardre, Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 87 años.
